subtitle: Review recovered pack confidence, inferred-vs-observed pressure, and evidence gaps before using it downstream.

sections.title: Confidence and Recovery Posture
sections.label: Recovery Posture
sections.why: Lead with the overall confidence and recovery posture of the reconstructed pack.

sections.title: Inferred-vs-Observed Reconciliation
sections.label: Reconciliation
sections.why: Use a matrix when pack-level recovered claims need observed-versus-inferred comparison.

sections.title: Recovered Findings under Review
sections.label: Recovered Finding
sections.why: Keep recovered cross-artifact findings dense and reviewable.

sections.title: Evidence Gaps and Weakly Supported Claims
sections.label: Evidence Gap
sections.why: Keep weak support visible instead of smoothing it away.

sections.title: Downstream Impact if Approved
sections.label: Impact
sections.why: Clarify what downstream work may treat as stable despite reconstruction limits.

sections.title: Traceability Map
sections.label: Evidence
sections.why: Tie substantive approval claims to exact canonical evidence.

sections.title: Validator Status
sections.label: Validation
sections.why: Show canonical and approval-view validation status together.

glance_cards.label: Evidence gaps
glance_cards.hint: Weakly supported claims or gaps across the pack.
